appraisal_events.evidence: « Allons, voyons, ne l'ennuie pas, il n'est pas ici pour être tourmenté, s'écria Mme Verdurin, je ne veux pas qu'on le tourmente, moi ! »
appraisal_events.explanation: Mme Verdurin publicly rebukes and overrules M. Verdurin’s attempt to make the pianist play, asserting her authority and protecting the pianist.

status_effects.explanation: His initiative is checked and he is corrected in front of others, weakening his local authority.
